methodology.decoupled_model: L_J0337(sigma1,sigma2) times L_clock(eta_*,kappa_*) with independent parameters
methodology.tied_model: zeta_i = sigma_i, mapped to eta_* and kappa_* at the Request 6 local expansion point
methodology.request3_usage: weak-field scale reference only; not included in the joint likelihood or evidence
methodology.clock_surrogate_note: Clock likelihood is a Gaussian surrogate in (eta_*,kappa_*) matched to the Request 6 clock-only posterior near s*.

request3_reference.note: Request 3 remains a weak-field scale sanity check only; these coefficients were not used as evidence in Request 7.
